en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER. OF DAVID. The fool says in his heart, "There is no God." They are corrupt, they do abominable deeds, there is none who does good.
zh: 愚頑人心裡說：“沒有 神。” 他們都是敗壞，行了可憎的事， 沒有一個行善的。

en: The LORD looks down from heaven on the children of man, to see if there are any who understand, who seek after God.
zh: 耶和華從天上察看世人， 要看看有明慧的沒有， 有尋求 神的沒有。

en: They have all turned aside; together they have become corrupt; there is none who does good, not even one.
zh: 人人都偏離了正道，一同變成污穢； 沒有行善的，連一個也沒有。

en: Have they no knowledge, all the evildoers who eat up my people as they eat bread and do not call upon the LORD?
zh: 所有作惡的都是無知的嗎？ 他們吞吃我的子民好像吃飯一樣， 並不求告耶和華。

en: There they are in great terror, for God is with the generation of the righteous.
zh: 他們必大大震驚， 因為 神在義人的群體中。

en: You would shame the plans of the poor, but the LORD is his refuge.
zh: 你們要使困苦人的計劃失敗， 但耶和華是他的避難所。

en: Oh, that salvation for Israel would come out of Zion! When the LORD restores the fortunes of his people, let Jacob rejoice, let Israel be glad.
zh: 但願以色列的救恩從錫安而出； 耶和華給他子民帶來復興的時候 ， 雅各要快樂，以色列要歡喜。
